blogs.title: Building a Multi-Agent Customer Support System with LangGraph & Spring Boot
blogs.subtitle: How to design an LLM Supervisor router and delegate tasks to specialized billing and technical agents using LangChain4j.

blogs.title: Automating GUI Tests: An Autonomous Squish Test Authoring Agent
blogs.subtitle: Using AST scanners, fuzzy matching, and multi-agent workflows to generate complete BDD Gherkin test packages from plain text requirements.

tweets.text: Excited to share my latest project: Resolve Pal! A production-grade multi-agent customer support system using Spring Boot (Java 21) and Next.js. Check out the supervisor pattern routing!
Deep JVM profiling is key when deploying AI agents in Spring Boot. Resolved a heap memory leak and thread contention issue, boosting P95 response times by 35%!
